UCS-85  HEAT TREATMENT OF TEST SPECIMENS. (a) When PWHT is required by UCS-79 or UW-28, the test specimens used for material acceptance shall be heat-treated to simulate the production PWHT cycle. (b) The simulated PWHT temperature and time shall be equal to or greater than the production values specified in UCS-79. (c) Impact test specimens heat-treated under this paragraph shall be tested in accordance with UCS-68 and shall meet the acceptance criteria of UG-84. Specimen preparation shall comply with UCS-57. See also UCS-56 for impact test requirements. Material identification shall be in accordance with UG-81.
